synthesis.driver: Oversupply and weak demand are capping prices despite Hormuz tensions; Brent slips further.
synthesis.based_on: UK Issues Warning Over Potential Hostile Acts in Strait of Hormuz

takes.uk issues warning over potential hostile: UK warning adds modest war-risk premium but oversupply keeps prices subdued.
takes.nato s claims on iran nuke strait of hor: Ceasefire tensions sustain risk sentiment but fail to lift oil prices.
takes.seafarers attacked in the strait of horm: Seafarer lawsuits highlight Hormuz risks but lack immediate supply impact.
